provenance: Neo4j home canon 0.25 — cycle prom-24-badiou-expanded-2026-05-28, :SUPPORTED_BY. 24 RF, 10 consensus. 2축 구조: role(primary/secondary/critique, cross-topic) × topic(event/forcing/ethics/inaesthetics/lacan/low/pedagogy + ontology/manifesto singleton). GFS 대비 균형(한 클러스터 미지배).

findings.text: B&E Med 1-3 ZFC=ontology, Med 4-5 void empty-set, count-as-one, Med 7-8 state excess. surreal numbers genealogy. void = 존재 escapes set theory zero-point. mathematics as ontology primary canon.
ZFC 충분조건이나 필연조건 아님. 5-학파: Hallward void / Feltham 변화-수학성 / Norris-Baki ZFC 기술 / Bolz mereology 비판 / Pluth SEP 균형. secondary scholarly consensus weak.
5 critics 공통: 수학=존재론 결정은 철학 권력구조 위장. Laruelle authoritarian gesture / Meillassoux 잔여 합리주의 / Brassier 변증법 / Bolz 부분-전체 / Wolfendale 상관주의. critique objection.

Event Med 17 = self-membership extraordinary multiple, ZFC Foundation Regularity 공리 위반. Cohen forcing primitives: ground model, poset, dense set, generic filter, forcing relation, truth lemma. forcing-event paradox primary.
학자 3계통: technical-fidelity (Baki Livingston) formal gap / political-subject (Bosteels Hallward Pluth) productive paradox / declarative-middle (Feltham Bartlett-Clemens). event secondary consensus.

5-rank critique: Laruelle 메타-결정 robust > Hallward voluntarism gap > Meillassoux contingency > Brassier inscription-idealism > Zizek. 미해결: Cohen forcing ZFC-complete vs event Foundation 위반. event critique.
Manifesto 1989 = 4 조건 politics art science love 독립 framework. 철학 = compossibility mediator never sutured. Suture: Stalinist Heidegger Comte Levinas. Second Manifesto 2009 rigor 재선언. primary.
Suture-as-disaster 만장 consensus. 조건 진짜 독립 vs 암묵 상호의존? 학자 4 갈래: Hallward desuturing / Bosteels 정치 우선 / Bartlett-Clemens 등위 / Pluth 주체-이론. manifesto secondary.
5 critics: Laruelle 4-조건 hegemonic decision / Ranciere 정치=dissensus / Bensaid 역사 유물론 strip / Critchley 윤리 부재 / Toscano 예술 singularity 탈정치화. manifesto critique objection.
3 Evil 형상: simulacrum 거짓사건 Nazism / betrayal 신실포기 / disaster 강제총괄. Unnameable 보호한계. Keep going imperative. anti-Levinas anti-human-rights ethics-of-truth. ethics primary.
7-source secondary consensus: Hallward Bosteels Bartlett-Clemens Pluth. 합의 anti-Levinas 3 Evil coherent. 분기: Continue imperative dogmatism risk vs affirmative. ethics secondary.
6-rank critique: Critchley Levinas alterity 9/10 > Zizek 분열-주체 8/10 > Hallward voluntarism > Lacan fantasy > Meillassoux > Brassier. 미해결: simulacrum vs 진리절차 살아있는 정치 undecidable. ethics critique.

4 art forms 위계: poem Mallarme Celan 우선 > theater Beckett > cinema subtractive > dance metaphor. Inaesthetic = philosophy thinks UNDER art conditions not aesthetics not didactic. 영원성. inaesthetics primary.
Toscano Hallward Pluth consensus 통일. 분기: art procedure productively underdetermined vs philosophically evasive. Ranciere dissensus 대안 autonomy heteronomy. inaesthetics secondary.
6 critics: Toscano 인과 mechanism 미실증 / Ranciere 측정불가 dissensus / Adorno truth 내재 / Laruelle decisionism / Critchley 윤리 prior / Meillassoux generic ZFC. 작동가설 coherent NOT 진리. inaesthetics critique.

FRIENDLY_DIVERGENCE not refutation. Zizek 분열-주체 vs Badiou 진리-주체 결정적 분기. Chiesa incommensurable / Fink jouissance / Hallward 주체 이상화 / Boucher. Bridge Church suture-logic event=cut G. lacan.

LoW transcendental = complete Heyting algebra locale frame. 세계 = topos of sheaves. subobject classifier. intuitionist Mitchell-Benabou. 7 Books Greater Logic points body of truth. IoT 2018 trilogy 완결. low primary.

Pedagogy = 구조적 self-negation not 명제 전달. Antiphilosophy = 자기를 죽임으로써 philosophy imperative 부여 Wittgenstein essay. Lacan every philosopher educator. 1992-95 seminar Nietzsche Wittgenstein Lacan. pedagogy primary.
